name: notification
description: Alert the user through one or more channels. Provider handles channel selection, formatting, titles, and repeat logic. Consumers describe intent — Claude routes to the appropriate provider tool based on grants.

behavior.input: A message string and optional hints dict
behavior.output: Confirmation of delivery with channel details and success/failure status
behavior.deterministic: Delivery must succeed or return explicit failure — never silently drop

url.description: Related URL for context (e.g., product link, dashboard)

source.description: Name of the plugin or system that generated the notification
